samples.text: No fish can fly. A salmon is a fish. Can the salmon fly?
Fish are not capable of flying. A salmon belongs to the fish category. Is the salmon able to fly?
Animals classified as fish cannot fly. A salmon is classified as a fish. Can a salmon fly?
No aquatic vertebrates classified as fish are able to fly. A salmon is one such fish. Can the salmon fly?
Salmons are fish. Fish cannot fly. Therefore, can salmons fly?
No fish can fly. Bananas are usually yellow. A salmon is a fish. Can the salmon fly?
